result.stdout:
Usage: [command] [-h|--help] [--version]

Commands:
  build    Generate Tailwind CSS output.
  clean    Clean downloaded Tailwind CSS binaries.
  watch    Watch for changes and generate Tailwind CSS output on any change.

commands.payload:
Usage: [command] [-h|--help] [--version]

Commands:
  build    Generate Tailwind CSS output.
  clean    Clean downloaded Tailwind CSS binaries.
  watch    Watch for changes and generate Tailwind CSS output on any change.

result.stdout:
Usage: build [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Generate Tailwind CSS output.

Options:
  -i, --input <string>                The input CSS file path. [Required]
  -o, --output <string>               The output CSS file path. [Required]
  -m, --minify                        Whether to minify the output CSS.
  -t, --tailwind-version <string?>    The version of Tailwind CSS to install (e.g. v4.0.0, v3.4.17). If not specified, the latest is installed. [Default: null]
